name: How do I start a workers comp claim after hurting my back at work in Boise?

mainEntity.name: How do I start a workers comp claim after hurting my back at work in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to employer immediately, get medical care, file claim form with state commission.
acceptedAnswer.description: Notify your employer in writing within 30 days (Idaho) or 180 days (Utah), seek medical treatment, and file a claim form with the state commission. Employer must provide a claim form or you file directly. Key factors: Get evaluated by approved providers; keep records of lost wages; no lawsuit needed—it's administrative. Follow up on approval; if denied, request a hearing. Hire an attorney early for best results, especially in Boise area.

description: Report to employer immediately, get medical care, file claim form with state commission.
